title: Executing "PRAGMA journal_mode" may delete journal file while it is in use.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt64, name String NOT NULL, value Float64 DEFAULT 0.0, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
INSERT INTO test_table (name, value) VALUES ('Test2', NULL);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Executing PRAGMA journal_mode deletes in-use journal file
